case_title: JONES ,SCHILLER & COMPANY VS HADIARIS PETER N.

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HADIARIS PETER N. HEARING SET FOR MAY-26-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,781.00 FILED BY JONES ,SCHILLER & COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HADIARIS PETER N. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES ,SCHILLER & COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HADIARIS PETER N. $1,781.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,821.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-26-1995, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES ,SCHILLER & COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HADIARIS PETER N. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HADIARIS PETER N.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-22-1995, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-13-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
